summary: Iteration 105 - 3CX Webhook Integration & Ad Intelligence Features Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: BD CRM modal has 4 tabs (Info, Transactions, Calls, Update), Mentor CRM modal has 4 tabs, Marketing Analysis page has Ad Intelligence tab with search bar and API Connected badge, 'awaiting 3CX sync' badge visible for 0-duration calls.

design_issues.screen: BD CRM Modal / Mentor CRM Modal
issues: Console warning: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for accessibility - consider adding VisuallyHidden DialogTitle

critical_code_review_comments: Minor accessibility warning: Dialog modals should have DialogTitle for screen reader users (can use VisuallyHidden component)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 105 verified: 1) 3CX Webhook: POST /api/3cx/webhook accepts flexible payloads with various field names (phonenumber/phone_number, duration/call_duration), parses duration strings ('3:45' -> 225s, '0:03:45' -> 225s), no auth required. 2) Webhook Setup Guide: GET /api/3cx/webhook-setup-guide returns URLs and configuration steps. 3) Ad Library Intelligence: POST /api/intelligence/ad-library/search accepts search_terms and returns ads, GET /api/intelligence/ad-library/searches returns saved searches. 4) Meta Token: PUT /api/settings/meta-ad-token saves token, GET /api/settings/meta-ad-token-status returns configured status. 5) BD CRM Modal: /bd page shows tabbed dialog with Info, Transactions, Calls, Update tabs. 6) Mentor CRM Modal: /mentor page shows tabbed dialog with same 4 tabs. 7) Call History: Shows 'Dialed — awaiting 3CX sync' badge for 0-duration calls. 8) Marketing Analysis: /marketing/analysis has Ad Intelligence tab with search bar.

3cx_webhook_basic_payload.details: POST /api/3cx/webhook accepts basic payload with phonenumber, duration, direction, type, extension, name

3cx_webhook_alternative_fields.details: Alternative field names (phone_number, call_duration, call_direction, call_type) accepted

3cx_webhook_setup_guide.details: GET /api/3cx/webhook-setup-guide returns webhook URLs and configuration steps

ad_library_search.details: POST /api/intelligence/ad-library/search accepts search_terms and returns results

bd_crm_modal_tabs.details: BD CRM modal has 4 tabs: Info, Transactions, Calls, Update

mentor_crm_modal_tabs.details: Mentor CRM modal has 4 tabs: Info, Transactions, Calls, Update

call_history_awaiting_sync_badge.details: Call history shows 'Dialed — awaiting 3CX sync' badge for 0-duration calls

marketing_ad_intelligence_tab.details: Marketing Analysis page has Ad Intelligence tab with search bar and API Connected badge
